name: Brrtz Agent Tool Draft

tools.name: search_gear
tools.description: Search Brrtz for used gear by terms, region, category, source selection, max price, and exclude terms.

tools.name: get_regions
tools.description: Return supported Brrtz regions, currency, status, and source coverage.

tools.name: get_sources
tools.description: Return source IDs, labels, regions, source type, and live or assist-style access posture.

tools.name: save_search
tools.description: Create or update a saved search intent for an authorized user.

tools.name: watch_listing
tools.description: Add a listing URL or normalized listing ID to the user's watchlist.

tools.name: get_new_matches
tools.description: Return new or fresh matches for a saved search since the last user-visible scan.

boundaries: Brrtz is not the merchant of record.
Brrtz links users back to original listing sources.
The connector should not republish full source listing databases.
Saved searches and watched listings require explicit user authorization.
